title: Star Wars HeroPack
description: A HeroPack for the FiskHeroes / Fisk's SuperHeroes mod that adds various different characters from the Star Wars Universe
body:
# Star Wars HeroPack

A HeroPack for the Fisk's Superheroes Mod

This HeroPack adds various different characters from the Star Wars Universe

[HeroPack Trailer](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Vt37_0UujBI)

[Check out our Discord](https://discord.com/invite/celestialnetwork 'Check out our Discord')

[Backup Discord Invite](https://discord.gg/ZbRGtPtbSs)

**How to Install:**
- Download the Latest Version of the [Fisk's SuperHeroes Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/fiskheroes)
- Download the [Star Wars HeroPack](https://modrinth.com/mod/star-wars-heropack)
- Start up Minecraft
- Go to Options > HeroPacks > Open HeroPack Folder
- Place the God of War HeroPack into the HeroPack Folder (Do not Unzip the HeroPack File)
- Create or Join an Existing Minecraft World and Enjoy!

**Official Server:**
- Server IP: HeroPackVerse.net
- [Modrinth ModPack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/heropack-verse-fiskheroes-server)
- [CurseForge ModPack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/the-heropack-verse-server)
- [Technic ModPack](https://www.technicpack.net/modpack/the-fiskheroes-server.1926692)

<details>
<summary>Suit List:</summary>

- Anakin Skywalker
- Obi-Wan Kenobi
- Mace Windu
- Jedi Knight Revan
- Darth Revan
- Darth Vader
- Darth Maul
- Ahsoka
- Mandalorian
- Mandalorian (Beskar Armor)
</details>
 
<details>
<summary>How to Unlock:</summary>

Nodes:
Betrayal: Fall into Lava as Anakin Skywalker

Butcher: Kill an innocent and defenseless wolf as Jedi Knight Revan

Beskar Upgrade: Rename a Dwarf Star Ingot to Beskar and hold it while wearing The Mandalorian

Suits:
Darth Vader: Unlock Anakin Skywalker and the Betrayal node

Darth Revan: Unlock Jedi Knight Revan and the Butcher node

Mandalorian (Beskar): Unlock Mandalorian and the Beskar Upgrade node
</details>
 

**Commands:**

Command to Reload HeroPack:

>/fiskheroes reload --resources

Command to Reload Sounds:

>/fiskheroes reload --flushSoundCache

Command to Reload HeroPack and Sounds:

>/fiskheroes reload --resources --flushSoundCache

Command to give yourself a Suit:

>/suit

<details>
<summary>Credits:</summary>

[SymbioteSpidey](https://modrinth.com/user/SymbioteSpidey) - Me, the Creator of this HeroPack and everything included within it (apart from what's made by others credited below)

[aidanangrybird](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/aidanangrybird/) - Coding Assistance

[Cosix101](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/cosix101/) - Skins

[Father_Khimsky](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/father_khimsky/) - Ahsoka Lightsaber Model

[Doot](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/doot/) - Darth Revan Skin
</details>
 

**Permissions:**

ModPack:

You may use this HeroPack in your ModPack as long as you first ask for and receive permission, then give credit and link back to this page.You are NOT allowed to modify this HeroPack!

 

Server:

You may use this HeroPack in your Server as long as you first ask for and receive permission, then give credit and link back to this page.You are NOT allowed to modify this HeroPack!

 

Warning:

Do NOT Re-Upload, Steal or Copy anything from this HeroPack!

 
<details>
<summary>HeroPack-Verse:</summary>

The HeroPack-Verse is a Collection of all my Highest Quality HeroPacks. Check them out below:

[God of War HeroPack](https://modrinth.com/mod/god-of-war-heropack)

[Star Wars HeroPack](https://modrinth.com/mod/star-wars-heropack)
</details>
